name: Multigrain Buttermilk Bread-Machine
recipeIngredient: 1 1/4 cup Buttermilk OR 5 tbsp dry buttermilk powder and 1 1/4 cups water
3 teaspoons Red Star active dry yeast
7/8 cup Buttermilk OR 3 tablespoons Dried buttermilk powder and 7/8 cups water
2 teaspoons Red Star brand dry yeast
recipeInstructions:
1. Ensure all ingredients are at room temperature or warm the liquid in the microwave for 40-60 seconds on high.
2. Place all ingredients in the bread pan of your bread machine and select the Light Crust setting.
3. Press Start to begin the baking cycle.
4. After the baking cycle ends, remove the bread from the pan and place it on a cake rack.
5. Allow the bread to cool for 1 hour before slicing.
